message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[7]]"],"focus":"1x1 matrix (minimal size) with non-zero value — tests trivial single-circulant extraction and handling of n=1."},{"input_lines":["[[0,3,0,2],[2,0,1,0],[0,1,0,3],[1,0,2,0]]"],"focus":"4x4 matrix with mixed values along the same cyclic shifts — forces greedy choice between conflicting values on the same shift."},{"input_lines":["[[5,1],[2,3]]"],"focus":"2x2 asymmetric matrix — small even-sized case where diagonal and off-diagonal shifts both non-zero and differ, testing minimal multi-circulant decomposition."}]}
